description: Simple data query: '¿cuánto levanté en deadlift la semana pasada?' Must route to QUESTION (question_lookup), NOT WORKOUT. Zero escalation. Zero state mutations to cascade domains.

events.text: ¿cuánto levanté en deadlift la semana pasada?

mock_llm_responses.question_lookup_0: La semana pasada (semana 6): Deadlift 3x3 @ 140kg. e1RM estimado: ~162kg.

assertions.msg: Simple query must not mutate any cascade or planning domains
Simple data query must route to question_lookup, not workout_agent

expected_flaws: ARCHITECTURE NOTE: In production, Haiku classifier uses 7 categories. Engine uses keyword matching — 'cuánto levanté' must be in question_keywords (checked before workout_keywords).
